title: Law Escapes the Box
description: Pages 9–13 focus on law escapes the box, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as corazon gives Law his life, his name, and a future, while Doflamingo's cruelty defines Law's reason to fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Goddann it! What the hell do you mean didn't go as smoothly as planned!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh yeah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A. Heal! Heal!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Blood, Stop!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: PAT

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hahaha! Don't be silly. This ain't some kind of magical power! I told ya, didn't I?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Then... then what should I do!? You... you got shot just for my sake, didn't you!?

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: LAW!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm fine! This isn't enough to kill me. But,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Just for a little while, I need to do something to stop the bleeding. Do me a favor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Off the western coast of the island is a marine scout ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: "I hate to use you while you're weakened, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Deliver this to them for me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: any marine, upon seeing this tube, should immediately understand...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: With this little thing, we can save a faraway country... the kingdom of dressrose.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: KING- DOM!? The marines!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Once you've delivered it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We're getting off this island!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Marines...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: This guy's by himself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Hey...take this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: OH! An information document!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Someone asked you to give this to me, didn't they?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: HAA- HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Thank you. I'll take care of this. Don't worry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: But, little boy... your voice sounds quite weak... are you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Can I trust you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Hm? Oh, if you're talking about this document, don't worry. I promise you I will...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: There's someone I want you to save! HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: He's been shot, and he's going to die...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: PLEASE, I'M BEGGIN' YOU! SAVE HIM!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: I DON'T WANT HIM TO DIE! PLEASE, DON'T LET HIM DIE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: He got shot for my sake!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Cora- Saaan!

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: This man said he'll tend to your wounds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: vergo!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: corazon!? What the hell are you doing here!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: You're terribly wounded too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Wait...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Did you just... speak?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Shit! I screwed up! I can't believe that this guy's top secret mission was this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Someone remember to

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Huh? Do you guys know each other?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Who is vergo? What...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: vergo?

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: He's one of our strongest, but he's away from the family right now on some sort of top-secret mission.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: This guy...he's vergo?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Why is he in the Marines!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Stop! The document!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: So vergo's mission was inflation of the Marines!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: What shitty luck!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Of all the countless, Marines on this sea...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: We had to run into this man!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: So that's how it is, roommate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Cora- San!!!

summary: Law Escapes the Box advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
